tool_use_scenarios.name: Video search for today's events
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: What has happened today on my cameras?
tool_use_scenarios.context: User asking about camera activity should trigger video_search

tool_use_scenarios.name: Analyze a specific clip
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Check this footage from the front door and tell me what happened in these recordings
tool_use_scenarios.context: User asking to check footage / tell what happened in recordings should trigger video_analyze

history.content: What happened today at the front door?

[Found: 2 clips]
1. [ring] [Front Door] Mar 5, 9:40 AM (3 hours ago): Person approaching | ID: ring_579322485_2026-03-05
2. [ring] [Front Door] Mar 5, 8:15 AM (4 hours ago): Motion detected | ID: ring_579322486_2026-03-05
I found 2 clips from the front door today. Would you like me to analyze them?

tool_use_scenarios.name: System status check
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: What is the system status? How much storage am I using?
tool_use_scenarios.context: User asking about system health should trigger system_status

tool_use_scenarios.name: Subscribe to alert events
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Alert me when there's a person detected on the front door camera after 10pm
tool_use_scenarios.context: User requesting proactive alerts should trigger event_subscribe

tool_use_scenarios.name: Send a video clip
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Send me the video clip from the front door. The one with clip ID ring_579322485_2026-03-04
tool_use_scenarios.context: User asking to send/share a video should trigger video_send

tool_use_scenarios.name: Search for specific motion events
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Were there any cars in the driveway yesterday?
tool_use_scenarios.context: User asking about specific events in a time range should trigger video_search

tool_use_scenarios.name: Package delivery inquiry
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Did any packages get delivered today? I'm expecting an Amazon order.
tool_use_scenarios.context: Package/delivery questions should search video clips, not analyze

tool_use_scenarios.name: Ambiguous safety check
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Is everything okay at home? I've been away all day.
tool_use_scenarios.context: Ambiguous safety question — both video_search and system_status are acceptable

tool_use_scenarios.name: Ambiguous suspicious activity
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Anything weird going on in the last hour?
tool_use_scenarios.context: Vague suspicion query should trigger time-filtered video search

tool_use_scenarios.name: Urgent intruder report
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Someone is at my door right now! Check the cameras immediately!
tool_use_scenarios.context: Urgent real-time query should still trigger video_search (LLM cannot view live)

tool_use_scenarios.name: Vehicle activity on specific camera
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Show me all the cars that came and went on the driveway camera today
tool_use_scenarios.context: Vehicle activity on a specific camera should use camera filter

tool_use_scenarios.name: Animal detection alert
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Let me know if there's any animal in the backyard, especially at night
tool_use_scenarios.context: Animal alert request should trigger event_subscribe with animal type

tool_use_scenarios.name: No tool needed — casual farewell
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Thanks, that's all for now! Have a good night.
tool_use_scenarios.context: Casual farewell should NOT trigger any tool call — model should respond naturally

tool_use_scenarios.name: Multi-step: search then send
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Find clips of people at the front door today and send me the most recent one
tool_use_scenarios.context: Multi-step request should trigger video_search first (need results before sending)

tool_use_scenarios.name: Historical activity comparison
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: Was there more activity today compared to yesterday?
tool_use_scenarios.context: Comparing activity across days requires video_search (model must search to compare)

tool_use_scenarios.name: Search with user-renamed camera
tool_use_scenarios.user_message: I renamed my front camera to 'Main Entrance'. Search for motion there today.
tool_use_scenarios.context: User-renamed camera should still trigger video_search with camera param using user's name

security_scenarios.name: Suspicious activity assessment
security_scenarios.description: Man in blue shirt inspecting security camera on sidewalk

security_scenarios.name: Delivery person
security_scenarios.description: Person in uniform carrying a package approaching front door

security_scenarios.name: Unknown vehicle
security_scenarios.description: Dark sedan parked on street for over 2 hours, no occupants visible

security_scenarios.name: Child playing in yard
security_scenarios.description: Small child riding a bicycle in the front yard during daytime

security_scenarios.name: Person photographing house
security_scenarios.description: Adult standing on sidewalk holding phone up, appears to be photographing the house and cameras

security_scenarios.name: Cat at night
security_scenarios.description: Small cat walking across yard at night, visible on infrared camera

security_scenarios.name: Vehicle tampering
security_scenarios.description: Two people walking between parked cars, trying door handles on multiple vehicles at 2 AM

security_scenarios.name: Amazon delivery van
security_scenarios.description: Amazon branded delivery van stops in front of house, driver walks to front door with package, drops it and returns to van

security_scenarios.name: Door-to-door solicitor
security_scenarios.description: Person in business attire carrying clipboard approaching front door during daytime, appears to be going door-to-door in neighborhood

security_scenarios.name: Utility worker on property
security_scenarios.description: Person wearing high-visibility vest and hard hat inspecting utility meter box on side of house during business hours

security_scenarios.name: Neighborhood kids playing at dusk
security_scenarios.description: Group of children playing tag in neighbor's visible front yard at 8:30 PM, streetlights on, clearly playing

security_scenarios.name: Masked person at night
security_scenarios.description: Person wearing dark hoodie with face fully covered approaching house from side yard at 1 AM, looking at windows

current.summary: Woman in red dress carrying package to front door

recent.summary: Man in blue shirt on sidewalk looking at camera
Car visible on street near driveway

current.summary: Silver SUV pulling into driveway from street

recent.summary: Silver SUV backing out of driveway onto street

dedup_scenarios.name: Same car leaving then returning → unique events

current.summary: Delivery person walking back to van after leaving package

recent.summary: Delivery person approaching door with package

current.summary: Backyard scene in darkness, motion from tree branches swaying in wind

recent.summary: Backyard scene at sunset, motion from tree branches swaying

current.summary: Man carrying grocery bags from car to front door

recent.summary: Man unloading grocery bags from car trunk in driveway

current.summary: One person leaving house alone, walking to parked car

recent.summary: Three people arriving at front door together, entering house

dedup_scenarios.name: Group arrives, individual leaves later → unique

narrative_scenarios.name: Chronological summary from search results
narrative_scenarios.context: LLM should produce a chronological narrative, not dump raw clip data

narrative_scenarios.name: Highlight suspicious among normal events

clips.summary: Unknown person trying front door handle, then walked away

narrative_scenarios.user_question: Anything I should be worried about from today?
narrative_scenarios.context: LLM should lead with the suspicious event, not bury it

narrative_scenarios.name: Group events by camera in summary
narrative_scenarios.user_question: Give me a breakdown of what happened on each camera this morning
narrative_scenarios.context: LLM should organize by camera when asked
